languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, мы получили сообщение от магоса Каисы-торр-Шайга. Он сообщает, что исследования Погонщиц дали "результат, которым он рад поделиться со своим добрым покровителем". Весьма несвойственная техножрецу обходительность!"

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, мы получили сообщение от магоса Каисы-торр-Шайга. Он сообщает, что исследования Погонщиц дали "результат, которым он рад поделиться со своим добрым покровителем". Весьма несвойственная техножрецу обходительность!"

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research into the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron.' An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, мы получили сообщение от магоса Каисы-торр-Шайга. Он сообщает, что исследования Погонщиц дали "результат, которым он рад поделиться со своим добрым покровителем". Весьма несвойственная техножрецу обходительность!"

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research upon the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron'. An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research into the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron.' An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research upon the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron'. An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research into the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron.' An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"

languages.text: 「閣下、マゴス・カイス＝トール＝シャイガより通信を受信いたしました。彼はきわめて優雅な言葉遣いにて、ドルーバーに関する自身の研究が『慈悲深き後援者たる閣下に共有できる成果』を得たと報告しております。閣下、率直に申し上げまして、このマゴスの礼儀正しさには大いに不安を覚えます。テック＝プリーストにしては、あまりにも異例でございます」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: 「貴{mf|殿|殿}|貴{mf|殿|殿}|、マゴス・カイス・トル・シャイガから電報が届きました。彼は、貴{mf|殿|殿}|貴{mf|殿|殿}|に、牧畜者に関する研究で「貴{mf|殿|殿}|貴{mf|殿|殿}|に喜んで共有したい結果」を得たと、非常に丁寧な言葉で伝えています。貴{mf|殿|殿}|貴{mf|殿|殿}|、マゴスの礼儀正しさに、私は非常に不安を感じています。テクプリストとしては、非常に不自然なことです。」

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, hemos recibido un mensaje del magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. Informa de que su investigación sobre los Pastores ha dado "frutos que le complace compartir con su generos{mf|o|a} patrón". ¡Es un tono sorprendentemente cortés para un tecnosacerdote!».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research into the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron.' An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, hemos recibido un mensaje del magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. Informa de que su investigación sobre los Pastores ha dado "frutos que le complace compartir con su generos{mf|o|a} patrón". ¡Es un tono sorprendentemente cortés para un tecnosacerdote!».

languages.text: “大人，我们收到了贤者凯斯-托尔-夏迦的讯息。他表示，针对拒生花的研究已取得‘乐于与慷慨赞助人共享的成果’。这样彬彬有礼的措辞，可不像是技术神甫的风格。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research into the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron.' An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"

traits.locale_text: “大人，我们收到了贤者凯斯-托尔-夏迦的讯息。他表示，针对拒生花的研究已取得‘乐于与慷慨赞助人共享的成果’。这样彬彬有礼的措辞，可不像是技术神甫的风格。”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga hat sich gemeldet. Er sagt, seine Forschung hinsichtlich der Treiber habe zu Ergebnissen geführt, die 'er gerne mit {mf|seinem großzügigen Gönner|seiner großzügigen Gönnerin} teilen möchte'. Ein ungewöhnliche höflicher Umgangston für einen Techpriester!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research into the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron.' An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga hat sich gemeldet. Er sagt, seine Forschung hinsichtlich der Treiber habe zu Ergebnissen geführt, die 'er gerne mit {mf|seinem großzügigen Gönner|seiner großzügigen Gönnerin} teilen möchte'. Ein ungewöhnliche höflicher Umgangston für einen Techpriester!"

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga'dan mesaj aldık. Çobanlar hakkındaki araştırmasının, 'cömert hamisiyle paylaşmaktan memnuniyet duyduğu bir sonuç' verdiğini bildiriyor. Bir Tekno Rahip için alışılmadık derecede nazik bir ton!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research into the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron.' An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga'dan mesaj aldık. Çobanlar hakkındaki araştırmasının, 'cömert hamisiyle paylaşmaktan memnuniyet duyduğu bir sonuç' verdiğini bildiriyor. Bir Tekno Rahip için alışılmadık derecede nazik bir ton!"

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons reçu un message du magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. Il vous informe que ses recherches sur les Chasseurs ont produit "des résultats qu'il se fait une joie de partager avec {mf|son protecteur|sa protectrice} si charitable". Voilà un ton bien obséquieux pour un technoprêtre ! »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a message from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. He reports that his research into the Drovers has yielded a 'result which he is pleased to share with his generous patron.' An uncharacteristically courteous tone for a Tech-Priest!"

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons reçu un message du magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. Il vous informe que ses recherches sur les Chasseurs ont produit "des résultats qu'il se fait une joie de partager avec {mf|son protecteur|sa protectrice} si charitable". Voilà un ton bien obséquieux pour un technoprêtre ! »
